gist.headline: Brand magic in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: StyleOps just sprouted in our app greenhouse! It's a clever new tool that uses our Flux models to generate cohesive brand assets from your style guides.
gist.summary: Added StyleOps, an AI-powered brand visual generator, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover StyleOps in our directory to easily generate cohesive brand assets using Pollinations' image models.
gist.visual_concept: StyleOps focuses on brand assets and style guides. Visual metaphor: Polly the bee as a designer/artist working on a brand identity. She can wear a tiny painter's beret and review a color palette or mood board with the Monitor Robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, looking at a glowing digital mood board showing colorful brand assets. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a pixelated color palette. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
